name: Tavern Days
short_description: Tarvern Days is a single-player game made with RPG Maker MV. Become a bar owner in a fantasy world and run a tarvern for 14 days. Find out how your choices determine the fate of your characters. (Almost) everything is in your hands.
detailed_description:
Tarvern Days is a single-player Visual Nobel game made with RPG Maker MV. Become a bar owner in a fantasy world and run a tarvern for 14 days. Find out how your choices determine the fate of your characters. (Almost) everything is in your hands.

- Save file -

Manual saving is only possible at the end of the day at the tavern.

It is automatically saved when moving the map, and is stored in the first column of the save.

It's impossible to call during the game. I recommend you turn off the game and call it.

- Keys -

F4 - Full Screen Settings

W, X - High Speed Skip

Click to determine your choice when using the mouse

When using a keyboard, select a choice with up and down keys and decide on a spacebar
